Notification.description: Notify the user that Claude Code needs their attention.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

hooks.description: Fetch Discord messages received since the last poll and inject them as context. See feedback_discord_confirmation_pings (Layer 4).
Catch up on Discord messages received while no session was active. See feedback_discord_confirmation_pings (Layer 4).
On /resume — catch up on Discord messages received while the session was suspended.
On context compaction — Monitor is wiped; pull any Discord messages that arrived during the gap so they aren't lost until the next UserPromptSubmit.
